textPlain:
For context:tidalcycles is a music programming language
strudel is an implementation for the webFor example, here's a Stranger Things inspired song in strudel:https://strudel.cc/?jq8RmPcjADF9#c2V0Y3BzKDAuNyk7CgpwMTogbig...

Very nice demo of React Flow and I like the neo brutalism theme in the settings.Not sure if it is intended or not: on Android Chrome your "Pad" and "Beats" have no indicators of the current location in a sequence.Also, I think "Samples" or "Sounds" might be more appropriate than "Synths."Are you planning to continue developing this project further?
Super minor nit: Put "Live demo: <link>" at the top of the readme.Github's project url thingy is hard to notice tucked into a sidebar.
Thanks! I was thinking it would be nice if someone wrote a post on making different rhythms in tidal cycles
